nasb.text: A leader who is a great oppressor lacks understanding, But he who hates unjust gain will prolong his days.

esv.text: A ruler who lacks understanding is a cruel oppressor, but he who hates unjust gain will prolong his days.

cnv.text: 昏庸的君主必多行強暴， 憎惡不義之財的，必享長壽。

ccb.text: 昏庸的君王残暴不仁， 恨不义之财的享长寿。

csbs.text: 无知的领袖是残酷的欺压者； 但恨恶私利的人必日子长久。
